label: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate Complete Course (Exam SAA-C03)
description: Prepare for the AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate exam (SAA-C03) with comprehensive study notes that blend cloud theory, hands-on AWS Console and CLI labs, and real-world architecture scenarios. Cover core services like EC2, S3, RDS, VPC, IAM, Lambda, CloudFront, Route 53, ELB, and Auto Scaling, plus disaster recovery, migration, cost optimization, and Well-Architected Framework principles using step-by-step Free Tier-friendly guides and exact CLI commands.
